rules.summary: Volatile data appears before reusable prompt content.
rules.validation: Render representative requests and confirm the cacheable prefix hash stays stable across users, timestamps, and request IDs.

rules.summary: Tool definitions, schemas, or serialized JSON change across otherwise reusable calls.
rules.validation: Sort tools and schemas deterministically, then compare rendered request bytes or canonical hashes across repeated calls.

rules.summary: Template, whitespace, media, or SDK path drift changes the effective prefix.
rules.validation: Compare raw rendered payloads from each code path and pin one canonical renderer for the cacheable prefix.

rules.summary: Dynamic tool sets inside an agent loop rewrite early prompt content.
rules.validation: Log tools_count, sorted tool-name hash, prefix hash, and cache usage for every agent step.

rules.summary: Compaction, truncation, or summarization mutates early conversation messages.
rules.validation: Confirm system, tools, and early stable anchor messages survive context management unchanged.

rules.summary: Mode switching or framework metadata mutates the cacheable prefix.
rules.validation: Compare prefix hashes before and after mode changes, tracing dynamic metadata placement.

rules.summary: Stable prefixes are routed across replicas or providers without cache locality.
rules.validation: Measure cache reads and TTFT by route, provider, region, and replica for each prefix family.

rules.summary: Parallel fan-out starts before a shared prefix is warm or visible to the cache.
rules.validation: Compare cache telemetry for a safe warm-up sequence versus immediate parallel fan-out.

rules.summary: Cache TTL, KV capacity, or eviction behavior does not match request cadence.
rules.validation: Correlate reuse cadence, TTL, KV pressure, eviction metrics, and warm-call TTFT.

rules.summary: Security isolation or per-request salts fragment otherwise shareable prefixes.
rules.validation: Document the intended trust boundary and estimate the cache-efficiency loss of the chosen isolation level.

rules.summary: Experiments, prompt variants, model settings, or router settings split reuse into small cache families.
rules.validation: Bucket cache metrics by prompt version, model settings, route, provider, and experiment assignment.
